---
title: "robustcause Smoke Test"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(comment = "#>", collapse = TRUE)
pkg_lib <- file.path(tempdir(), "robustcause-rmd-lib")
dir.create(pkg_lib, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
.libPaths(c(pkg_lib, .libPaths()))

if (!requireNamespace("remotes", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("remotes", lib = pkg_lib, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
}

remotes::install_github(
  "DanBaissa/RobustCause",
  subdir = "bindings/r/robustcause",
  lib = pkg_lib,
  upgrade = "never",
  force = TRUE,
  dependencies = TRUE,
  quiet = TRUE
)

library(robustcause, lib.loc = pkg_lib)
set.seed(42)
```

## Matrix Interface

```{r}
n <- 250
x1 <- rnorm(n)
x2 <- rnorm(n)
x3 <- runif(n, -1, 1)
y <- 1 + 2 * x1 - 1.2 * x2 + 0.8 * x3 + rnorm(n, sd = 0.25)
y[c(10, 50, 120, 200)] <- y[c(10, 50, 120, 200)] + c(8, -9, 7, -8)

X <- cbind(x1 = x1, x2 = x2, x3 = x3)

rlm_fit <- fit_rlm(X, y, method = "m", psi = "huber")
rlm_fit
confint(rlm_fit, hc_type = "HC3")
```

```{r}
mm_fit <- fit_rlm(
  X,
  y,
  method = "mm",
  mm_s_control = list(n_starts = 100, fast_s_screen_subsets = 100, fast_s_keep = 20)
)
mm_fit
head(mm_fit$weights)
```

## Formula Interface

```{r}
dat <- data.frame(y = y, x1 = x1, x2 = x2, x3 = x3)

rlm_formula <- fit_rlm(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3, data = dat, method = "mm")
rlm_formula
confint(rlm_formula, hc_type = "HC4")

s_formula <- fit_s_estimator(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3, data = dat, n_starts = 80, fast_s_screen_subsets = 80)
s_formula
```

## Robust SEs For `lm`

```{r}
lm_fit <- lm(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3, data = dat)
vcov_robust(lm_fit, hc_type = "HC3")
confint_robust(lm_fit, hc_type = "HC3")
```

## Weight Diagnostics

```{r}
plot_weights(rlm_fit)
plot_weights(mm_fit)
```

## Quick Checks

```{r}
stopifnot(length(rlm_fit$coef) == ncol(X) + 1)
stopifnot(is.matrix(vcov(rlm_fit)))
stopifnot(length(mm_fit$coef) == ncol(X) + 1)
stopifnot(all(is.finite(rlm_fit$coef)))
stopifnot(all(is.finite(mm_fit$coef)))
```

## Local Run Notes

This notebook installs the package directly from GitHub into a temporary,
isolated library at knit time.

```{r eval = FALSE}
rmarkdown::render("bindings/r/robustcause/robustcause-smoke-test.Rmd")
```
